note: Per-symbol observation window across archived Claude Code binaries. first_seen/last_seen are the earliest/latest scanned versions whose bundle contained the symbol (positive extraction evidence). removed_in is a conservative cliff-aware estimate: set only for a clean disappearance in the reliable extraction era (< ~2.1.160); later absence is untrusted (recall regressed there) and left null. Generated by scripts/backfill-binary.ts; interpreted by scripts/binary-lane.ts.
